name: Ethiopian Community Association in Atlanta, Inc.
tagline: Building intergenerational connections and strengthening community resilience.
description: ECAA is a nonprofit community organization serving Ethiopians and Ethiopian-Americans in the Atlanta area through cultural connection, community support, membership, leadership, events, youth programs, health initiatives, EDIR, and civic engagement.

meta.title: Ethiopian Community Association in Atlanta | ECAA
meta.description: ECAA is a nonprofit community organization serving Ethiopians and Ethiopian-Americans in Atlanta through cultural connection, community support, membership, leadership, events, youth programs, health initiatives, EDIR, and civic engagement.
